mapper.insert: INSERT INTO videos (user_id, title, description, video_url, cover_image, duration) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{videoUrl}, #{coverImage}, #{duration})
mapper.select: SELECT v.*, u.username FROM videos v LEFT JOIN users u ON v.user_id = u.id WHERE v.id = #{id} AND v.status = 1
SELECT v.*, u.username FROM videos v LEFT JOIN users u ON v.user_id = u.id WHERE v.status = 1 ORDER BY v.created_time DESC
SELECT v.*, u.username FROM videos v LEFT JOIN users u ON v.user_id = u.id WHERE v.user_id = #{userId} AND v.status = 1 ORDER BY v.created_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE videos SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE videos SET like_count = like_count + #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE videos SET status = 2 WHERE id = #{id}
